blockingIssues.description: PlatformToolsManager lifecycle wiring remains incomplete at runtime because no MCP server instances are registered into PlatformToolsManager via addServer(), so integration load/unload events do not propagate platform tools to active MCP sessions.
McpHub.removeTool(name) cleanup is incomplete: dynamic tools registered during session creation are not tracked in dynamicToolHandles, so removeTool can leave stale callable tools in active sessions.

Real X/Twitter, Slack, and Email adapter behavior is not guaranteed in default installs because required runtime SDK dependencies are missing from package.json while adapters retain mock-success fallback responses when SDK imports are unavailable.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For milestone m2 adapter features, require that 'real API wiring' includes runtime dependency presence in package.json and a non-mock runtime path in default installs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: f3 and f-fix-m2-scrutiny reviews both found adapter fallback/mock behavior despite implementation claims.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Ensure feature skillName values map to available skills, and add reviewer guidance for transcript retrieval fallback when mission worker-transcripts index is incomplete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple m2 reviews reported skillName mismatch and missing mission transcript entries for reviewed sessions.
